member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it. Specifies that an input argument was not null when the call returns.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.
The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LoopMode
member.summary: Specifies the loop behavior of temporal playback.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LoopMode.None
member.summary: Specifies that playback should not loop when the bounds of the temporal extent are reached

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LoopMode.Repeat
member.summary: Specifies that temporal playback should repeat when the bounds of the temporal extent are reached

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LoopMode.Reverse
member.summary: Specifies that temporal playback should reverse direction when the bounds of the temporal extent are reached

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.PlaybackDirection
member.summary: Specifies the direction of temporal playback.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.PlaybackDirection.Forward
member.summary: Specifies that playback advances forward in time

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.PlaybackDirection.Backward
member.summary: Specifies that playback moves backward in time

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeExtentChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments used when raising the TimeSlider.CurrentExtentChanged event.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeExtentChangedEventArgs.#ctor(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.TimeExtent,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.TimeExtent)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The new value.
The old value.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeExtentChangedEventArgs.NewExtent
member.summary: Gets the new value.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeExtentChangedEventArgs.OldExtent
member.summary: Gets the old value.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeSliderLabelMode
member.summary: Represents the display mode for time slider labels.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeSliderLabelMode.None
member.summary: Display no labels along the time slider

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeSliderLabelMode.CurrentExtent
member.summary: Display labels for the time slider's current extent (i.e. on the slider's thumbs)

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.TimeSliderLabelMode.TimeStepInterval
member.summary: Display labels for the time slider's time step intervals (i.e. on the slider's tick marks)

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LegendEntry
member.summary: Class used to represent an entry in the Legend control.
member.remarks: The property will contain the actual object it represents, mainly , or .

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LegendEntry.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The object this entry represents, usually a , or .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.LegendEntry.Content
member.summary: Gets the content that this entry represents, usually a , or .

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.ILayerContentItem
member.summary: Internal use only.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.ILayerContentItem.Content
member.summary: Gets the layer content this item encapsulates.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryViewStyle
member.summary: The view style of a basemap gallery.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryViewStyle.Automatic
member.summary: Display a grid when there is enough width to support that, otherwise display a list.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryViewStyle.Grid
member.summary: Always display a grid.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryViewStyle.List
member.summary: Always display a list.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem
member.summary: Encompasses an element in a basemap gallery.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.#ctor(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Basemap)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Basemap for this gallery item. Must be not null and loaded.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.CreateAsync(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Basemap)
member.summary: Creates an item to represent the given basemap.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.LoadAsync
member.summary: Loads the basemap and other properties.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.SpatialReference
member.summary: Gets the spatial reference, if known, of the underlying basemap.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.ThumbnailData
member.summary: Gets thumbnail as a byte array.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.EqualsBasemap(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Basemap)
member.summary: Returns true if the other basemap is equal to this item's underlying basemap.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.IsValid
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this basemap is a valid selection.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.Basemap
member.summary: Gets the basemap associated with this basemap item.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.Thumbnail
member.summary: Gets or sets the thumbnail to display for this basemap item.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.Tooltip
member.summary: Gets or sets the tooltip to display for this basemap item.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name to display for this basemap item.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.IsLoading
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this gallery item is actively loading the basemap.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryItem.IsLoadingThumbnail
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this gallery item is actively loading the .

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.BasemapGalleryController.BasemapIsActuallyNotABasemap(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Basemap)
member.summary: Maps and scenes start with an empty basemap that should not be shown in the UI.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel
member.summary: Backing controller for a search experience, intended for use with SearchView. SearchView supports searching, with search-as-you-type for multiple search providers via .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.ActiveSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the active search source, if one is selected. If there is no selection, all sources will be used for the search.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.IsSearchInProgress
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a search operation is in progress.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.IsSuggestInProgress
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a suggestion request is in progress.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.IsWaiting
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a waiting operation (search, suggestion) is in progress.
member.remarks: This can be used to implement activity indicator or progress bar display.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.SelectedResult
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected search result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.CurrentQuery
member.summary: Gets or sets the current query.
member.remarks: Call to refresh suggestions after updating the query.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.DefaultPlaceholder
member.summary: Gets or sets the default placeholder to use when there is no or the does not have a placeholder defined. Consumers should always display the in the UI, rather than accessing this property directly.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.ActivePlaceholder
member.summary: Gets the correct placeholder to display in the UI.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.SearchMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the search mode, which defaults to . This mode controls how many results are displayed when a search is performed.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.QueryArea
member.summary: Gets or sets the query area to use when searching and getting suggestions. When used in conjunction with a GeoView, this property should be set every time navigation completes, to enable automatic update of the property.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.QueryCenter
member.summary: Gets or sets the center point around which results should be returned.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.IgnoreAreaChangesFlag
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether changes to the query area should be ignored. This is used to prevent becoming true because the view zoomed to a result.
member.remarks: Set this value to true when the GeoView is being navigated to show results, and set to false when the navigation completes.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.Sources
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of available search sources, which can be updated dynamically.
member.remarks: See for a convenient method to populate this collection automatically.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.Results
member.summary: Gets the list of search results for the most-recently completed query. Clearing a search via will set this collection to null.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.Suggestions
member.summary: Gets the list of search suggestions. This value is set after calls to .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.IsEligibleForRequery
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether spatial parameters have changed enough to justify displaying a 'Repeat Search Here' button.
member.remarks: 'Repeat Search Here' is a common pattern in applications that return multiple search results.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.CommitSearch
member.summary: Submits the current query as a fresh search.
member.remarks: The search will return results from the or all if is null. Search in progress can be cancelled by calling .

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.RepeatSearchHere
member.summary: Repeats the current search, with results confined to the area defined by .
member.remarks: This is used to allow users to narrow down search results using a geographic constraint. This is especially useful when a search results in multiple results.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.UpdateSuggestions
member.summary: Updates for the current query.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.AcceptSuggestion(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion)
member.summary: Initiates a search using a suggestion as the query.
member.param: A suggestion from to be used as basis for the search.
member.remarks: This will update to match the selected suggestion.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.PrepareForNewSearch
member.summary: Cancels any previous operations, clears results, and gets ready for a new search.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.ClearSearch
member.summary: Cancels any active search/suggest tasks, then clears all results and the current query.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.CancelSearch
member.summary: Cancels any active search task.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.CancelSuggestion
member.summary: Cancels any active suggest task.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchViewModel.ConfigureDefaultWorldGeocoder(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Configures the viewmodel with a search source optimized for use with the Esri World Geocoder service.
member.param: Token used for cancellation.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource
member.summary: Defines the API contract for sources of search results that can be used with .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name for the source, which may be displayed in the UI.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.Placeholder
member.summary: Gets or sets the placeholder used for this source, which may be displaye in the UI.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.DefaultCalloutDefinition
member.summary: Gets or sets the callout definition used for results by default.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.DefaultSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the symbol to be used for results by default.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.DefaultZoomScale
member.summary: Gets or sets the default zoom scale to be used for results from this source.
member.remarks: This value should be ignored when the underlying provider (e.g. LocatorTask) provides a viewpoint. Otherwise this zoom scale should be used to create the viewpoint for point results.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.MaximumResults
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of results to return when completing a search.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.MaximumSuggestions
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of results to return when requesting search suggestions.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.SearchArea
member.summary: Gets or sets the area to be used as a constraint for searches and suggestions.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.PreferredSearchLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the point to be used as an input to searches and suggestions.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.SuggestAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a list of suggestions for the given query.
member.param: Text of the query.
Token used to cancel requests (e.g. because the search text has changed).
member.returns: Task returning a list of suggestions.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a list of search results for the given query.
member.param: Text of the query.
Token used to cancel requests (e.g. because the search was changed or canceled).
member.returns: Task returning list of search results.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.SearchAsync(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a list of search results for the given suggestions.
member.param: Suggestion to use for the search.
Token used to cancel searches.
member.returns: Task returning a list of results.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.RepeatSearchAsync(System.String,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Geometry.Envelope,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Repeats the last search, with results restricted to the current visible area.
member.param: Text to be used for the query.
Extent used to limit the results.
Token used to cancel search.
member.returns: Task returning a list of results.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.NotifySelected(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult)
member.summary: Used to notify the source when the has selected a result.
member.remarks: This can be used to implement custom selection behavior (e.g. when using a ).
member.param: The given search result.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource.NotifyDeselected(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult)
member.summary: Used to notify the source when the has deselected a result, or all results if is null.
member.remarks: This can be used to implement custom selection behavior (e.g. when using a ).
member.param: The result that has been deselected.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource
member.summary: Basic search source implementation for generic locators.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.CreateDefaultSourceAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a configured for use with the Esri World Geocoder service.
member.param: Token used for cancellation.
member.remarks: This method will re-use a static LocatorTask instance to improve performance.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.LoadTask
member.summary: Gets the task used to perform initial locator setup.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the locator. Defaults to the locator's name, or "locator" if not set.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.MaximumResults
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of results to return for a search. Default is 6.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.MaximumSuggestions
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of suggestions to return. Default is 6.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.GeocodeParameters
member.summary: Gets the geocode parameters, which can be used to configure search behavior.
member.remarks: , , and are set by automatically on search. is set to "*" when the is loaded for the first time.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.SuggestParameters
member.summary: Gets the suggestion parameters, which can be used to configure suggestion behavior.
member.remarks: and are set automatically on search.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.Locator
member.summary: Gets the underlying locator.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.Placeholder
member.summary: Gets or sets the placeholder to show when this search source is selected for use.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.DefaultCalloutDefinition
member.summary: Gets or sets the default callout definition to use with results.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.DefaultSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the default symbol to use when displaying results.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.SubtitleAttributeKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the attribute key to use as the subtitle when returning results. Key must be included in .

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.#ctor(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.LocatorTask)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. to create a source configured for use with the Esri World Geocoder.
member.param: Locator to be used.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.NotifySelected(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult)
member.summary: This search source does not track selection state.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.NotifyDeselected(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult)
member.summary: This search source does not track selection state.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.ResultToSearchResult(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.GeocodeResult})
member.summary: Converts geocode result list into list of results, applying result limits and calling necessary callbacks.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.SuggestionToSearchSuggestion(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.SuggestResult})
member.summary: Converts suggest result list into list of suggestions, applying result limits and calling necessary callbacks.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.GeocodeResultToSearchResult(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.GeocodeResult)
member.summary: Creates a basic search result for the given geocode result.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.LocatorSearchSource.SuggestResultToSearchSuggestion(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.SuggestResult)
member.summary: Creates a basic search suggestion for the given suggest result.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource
member.summary: Search source intended for use with the World Geocode Service and similarly-configured geocode services.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.RepeatSearchResultThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum number of results to attempt to return. If there are too few results, the search is repeated with loosened parameters until enough results are accumulated.
member.remarks: If no search is successful, it is still possible to have a total number of results less than this threshold. Does not apply to repeated search with area constraint. Set to zero to disable search repeat behavior. Defaults to 1.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.RepeatSuggestResultThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum number of suggestions to attempt to return. If there are too few suggestions, request is repeated with loosened constraints until enough suggestions are accumulated.
member.remarks: If no search is successful, it is still possible to have a total number of results less than this threshold. Does not apply to repeated search with area constraint. Set to zero to disable search repeat behavior. Defaults to 6.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.ResultSymbolStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the web style used to find symbols for results. When set, symbols are found for results based on the result's `Type` field, if available.
member.remarks: Defaults to the style identified by the name "Esri2DPointSymbolsStyle". The default Esri 2D point symbol has good results for many of the types returned by the world geocode service. You can use this property to customize result icons by publishing a web style, taking care to ensure that symbol keys match the `Type` attribute returned by the locator.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.#ctor(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.LocatorTask,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Symbology.SymbolStyle)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Locator to use.
Symbol style to use to find results.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.SuggestionToSearchSuggestion(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.SuggestResult})
member.summary: Converts suggest result list into list of suggestions, applying result limits and calling necessary callbacks.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.SuggestResultToSearchSuggestion(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.SuggestResult)
member.summary: Creates a basic search suggestion for the given suggest result.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.WorldGeocoderSearchSource.ResultToSearchResult(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Tasks.Geocoding.GeocodeResult})
member.summary: Converts geocode result list into list of results, applying result limits and calling necessary callbacks.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult
member.summary: Wraps a search result for display.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.DisplayTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the title that should be shown whenever the result is displayed.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.DisplaySubtitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the subtitle that should be shown whenever the result is displayed.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.OwningSource
member.summary: Gets the search source that created this result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.GeoElement
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional GeoElement for the result. This could be a graphic for a locator search, a feature for a feature layer search, or null if there is nothing to display on the map.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.SelectionViewpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the selection viewpoint for the result. Some search sources will return a viewpoint that should be used when a result is selected.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.CalloutDefinition
member.summary: Gets or sets the CalloutDefinition used to display the result.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Data.GeoElement,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Viewpoint)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Sets the .
Sets the .
Sets the .
Sets the .
Sets the .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.MarkerImage
member.summary: Gets the image displayed for this result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResult.MarkerImageData
member.summary: Gets or sets the image displayed for this result, in a format useful for cross-platform scenarios.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResultMode
member.summary: Defines how many results should be returned by a search.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResultMode.Single
member.summary: Always try to return a single result.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResultMode.Multiple
member.summary: Always try to return multiple results.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchResultMode.Automatic
member.summary: Try to make the right choice of single or multiple results based on context.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion
member.summary: Wraps a search suggestion for display.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion.DisplayTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the title to use when displaying a suggestion.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion.DisplaySubtitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional subtitle that may be used when displaying a suggestion.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion.IsCollection
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this result is for a collection (e.g. 'Coffee Shops') or a single result (e.g. 'Starbucks on Grand').

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion.OwningSource
member.summary: Gets the that created this result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion.UnderlyingObject
member.summary: Gets or sets any underlying object for the suggestion.
member.remarks: This is helpful in cases where an underlying suggestion object is useful when completing a search. For example, when using a locator, the underlying should be used when accepting the suggestion for a search.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.SearchSuggestion.#ctor(System.String,Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.ISearchSource)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Sets .
Sets .

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.UtilityNetworkTraceCompletedEventArgs
member.summary: Event argument used by event.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.UtilityNetworkTraceCompletedEventArgs.Parameters
member.summary: Gets the used by trace.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.UtilityNetworkTraceCompletedEventArgs.Results
member.summary: Gets the returned by trace.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.UtilityNetworkTraceCompletedEventArgs.Error
member.summary: Gets the raised by trace.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.UtilityNetworkChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Event argument used by event.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.Controls.UtilityNetworkChangedEventArgs.UtilityNetwork
member.summary: Gets the new value for .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.ShouldDisplayFloorPicker
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether there is enough information to successfully display a FloorPicker. Observe this to dynamically hide/show the view as needed.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.AllDisplayLevelsSelected
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether all levels should be visible simultaneously.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.ObservedViewpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the viewpoint observed from an associated MapView or SceneView. Depending on configuration, setting this property will update selection.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.RequestedViewpoint
member.summary: Gets the viewpoint requested by the floorfilter. Observe this property to handle viewpoint changes driven by selection or manual zoom.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.SelectedSite
member.summary: Gets the selected site. See to change this.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.SelectedLevel
member.summary: Gets the selected level.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.DisplayLevels
member.summary: Gets the levels for the currently selected facility. May be null or empty; not all facilites have levels. This collection is displayed in a level/floor list.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.DisplayFacilities
member.summary: Gets the facilities for the selected site. Can be null or empty; not all sites have facilities.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.AllFacilities
member.summary: Gets all of the facilities in the floor manager, for all sites.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.AllSites
member.summary: Gets all of the sites in the floor manager.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.SelectedFacility
member.summary: Gets the selected facility. If sites are present, the set facility must be part of the already-selected site. Callers must enforce this requirement, or controller will be left in an inconsistent state.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.ForceZoomToSelection
member.summary: Zoom to the current selection. Intended for use with an explicit "Zoom" button.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.ZoomToSelection(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Floor.FloorFacility,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Zoom to the new selection when appropriate. Intended for use with automatic zooming behavior (e.g. automatic zoom to selected facility).

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.UndoSelectAllDisplayLevels
member.summary: Deselects all levels, then reselects the level that was selected at the time that was called.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.SelectSingleSite(System.Boolean)
member.summary: If there is only one site, and configuration allows, select that site.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.FloorFilterController.GroundFloorForFacility(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Mapping.Floor.FloorFacility)
member.summary: Gets the ground floor, or the only floor, in the input facility. May return null level; some facilities do not have any levels.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.NullSelectionLevelMode
member.summary: Defines how levels should be displayed when there is no selection.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.ExternalLevelSelectionMode
member.summary: Defines FloorFilter manages the selection of levels in facilities that aren't currently selected.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.AutomaticSelectionMode
member.summary: Defines the selection modes for the FloorFilter.

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.AutomaticSelectionMode.Never
member.summary: Never update selection from the observed viewpoint

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.AutomaticSelectionMode.Always
member.summary: Always update selection from the observed viewpoint, and clear selection if there is nothing in view

member.name: F:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.AutomaticSelectionMode.AlwaysNonClearing
member.summary: Always update selection from the observed viewpoint, but don't clear selection if there is no facility/site/level visible

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController
member.summary: Internal class used to manage utility network tracing.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.Results
member.summary: Gets the collection of results.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.UtilityNetworks
member.summary: Gets the collection of available utility networks.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.TraceTypes
member.summary: Gets the collection of available trace types for the .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.StartingPoints
member.summary: Gets the collection of starting points. Consumers should use to add to this collection.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.SelectedUtilityNetwork
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected utility network. Setting this value will reset the controller then update .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.SelectedTraceType
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected trace type. Setting this value will automatically update the trace name.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.Map
member.summary: Gets or sets the Map from which will be populated.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.SelectedStartingPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected starting point. Selecting a starting point selects the and updates and .

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.TraceAsync
member.summary: Runs the trace operation. Results are added to .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.AutoZoomToTraceResults
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to automatically zoom to trace results.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.TraceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name to use to label the next trace result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.StartingPointSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting point symbol.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.ResultPointSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the result point symbol.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.ResultLineSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the result line symbol.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.ResultFillSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the result fill symbol.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityNetworkTraceToolController.ResultColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the result color. Setting this value will update , , and if they are of type , , and respectively.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult
member.summary: Encapsulates a utility network trace operation, with all parameters and results, packaged for convenient use in a UI.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.RawResults
member.summary: Gets the full results, if any, from the utility trace operation.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.FunctionResults
member.summary: Gets the function results, if any, from the utility trace operation.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Warnings
member.summary: Gets the warnings, if any, from the utility trace operation.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Graphics
member.summary: Gets the graphics results, if any, from the utility trace operation.
member.remarks: Setting or will add or remove these graphics from .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.ElementResults
member.summary: Gets the element results, if any, from the utility trace operation.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.ResultOverlay
member.summary: Gets the graphics overlay for visualizing graphics results. This will be populated with the graphics in by default.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.ElementResultsGrouped
member.summary: Gets the utility element results, if any, grouped by asset group.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name for this trace operation. This is use configurable to facilitate differentiation of trace operations.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Configuration
member.summary: Gets the named trace configuration used to create this result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.StartingPoints
member.summary: Gets the starting point inputs to the trace.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Parameters
member.summary: Gets teh parameters used to create this result.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Features
member.summary: Gets the features from the element results, if any.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets the error part of the trace result, if there is one.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.GraphicVisualizationColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color used for graphic symbology.
member.remarks: Only , , and will be affected when setting this property.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.AreFeaturesSelected
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether feature results are selected. Setting this value will select or unselect features in their respective feature layers.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.AreGraphicsShown
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether graphic results are shown. Setting this value will add or remove from .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.VisualizationState
member.summary: Gets or sets a composite value reflecting the combined values of and .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.UtilityTraceOperationResult.HasAnyResults
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there are any results from the operation.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel
member.summary: Models a starting point used for a utility network trace.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.SelectionGraphic
member.summary: Gets the graphic representing the starting point, which may have different geometry from the .
member.remarks: In the case of line elements, the starting point will be a point on the line. Setting will change the graphic's geometry.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.ZoomToExtent
member.summary: Gets the extent used for zooming to the starting point.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.Symbol
member.summary: Gets the symbol used to visually identify the starting point in a list.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.StartingPoint
member.summary: Gets the underlying utility element.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.PopupManager
member.summary: Gets the popup manager for the starting point.
member.remarks: The popup can be used to inspect and differentiate starting points.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.FractionAlongEdge
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting point's location along a line element. Setting this value will update the geometry of .

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.TerminalPickerVisible
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether users should be allowed to specify a terminal for the starting point.

member.name: P:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.FractionSliderVisible
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether users should be allowed to specify a position along a line feature for the starting point.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel.Equals(Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.UI.StartingPointModel)
member.remarks: This is used internally to enable appropriate warnings for duplicate trace operations.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.Internal.StringExtensions
member.summary: Helper class for providing common cross-platform string manipulations.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.Internal.StringExtensions.ToPlainText(System.String)
member.summary: Strips-out html code from text.
member.param: Text that may contain html code.
member.returns: Plain text after html code is removed.

member.name: T:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.Internal.DelegateCommand
member.summary: Simple command implementation.

member.name: M:Esri.ArcGISRuntime.Toolkit.Internal.DelegateCommand.#ctor(System.Action)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
